Physical relationships: The mustard bottle is resting on top of the cracker box. A soup can is located very close to, or in slight contact with, its top-left edge.
Reason: A slower retrieval speed helps prevent unwanted movement of the underlying cracker box due to friction and minimizes the risk of knocking over the adjacent soup can.
Best direction reason: Directions around 3 to 5 o'clock move the bottle completely away from the soup can and safely over the flat surface of the cracker box into open space.
Worst direction reason: Moving towards 10 o'clock will result in a direct collision with the soup can, likely displacing it.
